title: NAREDCO is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)

jsonLd.title: NAREDCO is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
NAREDCO, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Property Advisor for our Surat operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About NAREDCO:
NAREDCO is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Property Valuation

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NAREDCO!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
